item.title: Lindt表示GLP-1使用者巧克力摄入量增加而非减少
item.description: 瑞士巧克力制造商连德（Lindt & Sprüngli）周二表示，美国GLP-1减肥药使用者中的巧克力销量增长速度快于其他人群。该公司援引的数据与预期相反——此前普遍认为减肥药会降低糖果需求。【原文：Chocolate sales are rising faster among U.S. users of ​GLP-1 weight-loss drugs than in the rest ‌of the population, Swiss chocolatier Lindt & Spruengli said on Tuesday, citing data that went against expectations the drugs ​would reduce confectionery demand.】

item.title: 乐高押注宝可梦与互动积木，贸易战恐推高成本
item.description: 乐高首席执行官表示，随着中东冲突导致油价和气价上涨，该公司正为能源和原材料成本上升做准备。这家丹麦玩具制造商正通过推出互动式"智能积木"和宝可梦联名产品来刺激增长。【原文：Lego is bracing for higher energy and ​raw material costs as oil and gas prices rise amid conflict in the Middle East, its ‌chief executive said, as the Danish toymaker looks to spur growth with interactive "smart bricks" and Pokemon tie-ups.】

item.title: 英国必胜客年度利润下滑15%
item.description: 英国必胜客集团周二公布年度利润下滑15%，这一年深受需求疲软、销售低迷和成本高企的困扰。【原文：Britain's Domino's Pizza Group on ​Tuesday posted a ‌15% fall in annual profit for ​a year ​plagued with muted demand, ⁠weak sales ​and high costs.】

item.title: 沙特阿美警告：若霍尔木兹海峡航运不恢复，石油行业将面临"灾难性后果"
item.description: 沙特阿拉伯国家石油公司（Aramco）周二表示，如果伊朗战争继续扰乱霍尔木兹海峡的航运，全球石油市场将面临"灾难性后果"。作为全球最大的石油出口商，该公司警告称，若伊朗冲突持续影响该海峡的运输，将对国际能源供应链造成严重冲击。【原文：Saudi Arabia's Aramco , the world's ‌top oil exporter, said on Tuesday that there would be "catastrophic consequences" for the world's oil markets if the Iran war continues to disrupt shipping in the Strait ​of Hormuz.】

item.title: 澳航因中东冲突导致燃油成本飙升而上调国际航线票价
item.description: 澳洲航空周二表示，鉴于中东冲突导致喷气燃料成本飙升，本周将上调国际航线票价。【原文：Qantas Airways said on Tuesday it would hike fares ​on its international routes this week in response ‌to the surge in jet fuel costs due to the conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 大众汽车利润减半，遭关税重创，中国市场战火纷飞
item.description: 大众汽车将面临又一个艰难之年，关税问题和重夺中国市场的竞争将成为主导因素。这家欧洲最大汽车制造商周二公布运营利润大幅下滑，并预测其不断萎缩的利润率仅会实现温和复苏。【原文：Volkswagen is in ‌for another tough year dominated by tariffs and the battle to win back China, after Europe's largest carmaker reported a slump in operating profit on Tuesday and forecast only a modest recovery for ​its dwindling margin.】

item.title: 空中出租车制造商Archer指控竞争对手Joby与中国存在非法联系
item.description: 电动空中出租车制造商Archer Aviation周一提起反诉，指控竞争对手Joby Aviation欺诈美国政府，并隐瞒其与中国之间的密切联系，以此获取不公平的竞争优势。【原文：Electric air-taxi ​maker Archer Aviation accused rival Joby Aviation in a countersuit filed ‌Monday of defrauding the U.S. government and hiding close ties to China that it used to gain an unfair competitive advantage.】

item.title: 德国初创企业计划建设30兆瓦人工智能数据中心，以增强主权控制力
item.description: 德国初创企业Polarise计划建造一座30兆瓦的人工智能数据中心，该项目将使德国本土运营的计算能力翻倍。此举正值欧洲各国加紧努力，以加强对关键技术基础设施的掌控。【原文：German start-up Polarise plans to build a new 30-megawatt artificial intelligence ​data centre that would double Germany's domestically-run computing capacity as European nations push ‌to gain more control over critical tech infrastructure.】

item.title: 雷诺计划到2030年实现销量增长23%，目标是通过海外扩张实现这一目标。
item.description: 雷诺宣布了一项五年战略，旨在保持在全球严峻市场中的竞争力。该公司表示，计划到2030年将雷诺品牌汽车的海外销量占比提升至半数，并实现销量增长超过五分之一。【原文：Renault plans to sell half of its Renault brand cars overseas by 2030 and grow volumes by ​over a fifth, it said as it unveiled a five-year strategy aimed at remaining ‌competitive in a tough global market.】

item.title: 晨间要闻：特朗普称战争已"非常彻底"——伊朗另有打算
item.description: 格雷戈尔·斯图尔特·亨特为您解析欧洲及全球市场今日展望：【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Gregor Stuart Hunter:】

item.title: 焦点：欧洲货运卡车制造商严阵以待，应对中国低成本竞争对手的冲击浪潮
item.description: 今年，中国电动货卡正加速进军欧洲市场，沿着中国电动汽车开辟的道路前进，凭借更先进的技术和更低廉的价格，正威胁着颠覆欧洲市场格局。【原文：Chinese electric freight trucks are rolling into Europe at pace this year, following the trail blazed by Chinese EVs and threatening to upend the market with better technology and lower prices.】

item.title: 前Meta人工智能主管杨立昆的AMI公司为其另类人工智能方案筹集10.3亿美元
item.description: 由前Meta首席人工智能科学家杨立昆创立的初创公司Advanced Machine Intelligence周二宣布，已完成1.03亿美元融资，公司估值达35亿美元。该公司致力于将围绕推理、规划和"世界模型"构建的人工智能系统商业化。【原文：Advanced Machine Intelligence, the startup founded by former Meta Platforms chief AI scientist Yann LeCun, said on Tuesday ​it raised $1.03 billion based on a $3.50 billion pre-money valuation, as it ‌seeks to commercialize artificial intelligence systems built around reasoning, planning and "world models."】

item.title: 美国联邦航空管理局对所有捷蓝航空航班发布地面停飞令
item.description: 美国联邦航空管理局周二在一份通告中表示，捷蓝航空已要求对所有目的地实施地面停飞。【原文：JetBlue ​Airways has requested for ‌a ground stop at all destinations, ​the U.S Federal ​Aviation Administration said in ⁠an advisory on ​Tuesday.】

item.title: 报告称2025年美国太阳能装机量将下滑，特朗普政策冲击市场
item.description: 一项研究周二显示，2025年美国太阳能市场新增装机量较上年有所下降，这表明在特朗普总统取消对可再生能源开发商的补贴和税收优惠后，该行业整体发展势头趋缓。【原文：The U.S. solar market added fewer new installations in 2025 compared to the year before, a study showed on Tuesday, pointing to cooling momentum ​across the sector after President Donald Trump scrapped subsidies and tax ‌breaks for renewable energy developers.】

item.title: 乌克兰冬季两项运动员将银牌归功于ChatGPT
item.description: 乌克兰选手马克西姆·穆拉什科夫斯基将自己获得米兰-科尔蒂纳冬季残奥会银牌的功劳归功于人工智能，称ChatGPT是"革命性技术"。他在周日的冬季两项比赛中获得亚军后如是说。【原文：Ukraine’s Maksym Murashkovskyi credited artificial intelligence for helping him win a ​silver medal at the Milano Cortina ‌Winter Paralympics, calling ChatGPT a “revolutionary technology” after finishing runner‑up in Sunday’s biathlon event.】

item.title: 航空公司因燃油价格上涨开始提高票价，股价趋于稳定
item.description: 新西兰航空周二表示，因中东冲突已上调票价，并可能采取进一步定价措施，这凸显出全球航空公司将如何寻求将油价上涨的成本转嫁给乘客。【原文：Air New Zealand said on Tuesday it has raised fares due to the Middle East conflict and may take further pricing action, underscoring ​how global airlines will seek to pass on the costs of higher oil prices to passengers.】

item.title: 人类公司高管称五角大楼列入黑名单可能导致数十亿美元销售损失，损害企业声誉
item.description: 人类公司高管表示，美国政府将这家人工智能公司列入黑名单，可能使其2026年收入减少数十亿美元，并造成声誉损害。【原文：Anthropic executives said the U.S. government's blacklisting of the AI firm could cut its 2026 revenue by multiple billions of dollars and cause reputational harm.】

item.title: 亚洲股市反弹，油价暴跌，特朗普称伊朗战争或将结束
item.description: 亚洲股市周二开盘走高，油价则大幅下跌。此前美国总统特朗普表示中东战争"可能很快结束"，导致隔夜市场剧烈波动。【原文：Asian stocks rallied and oil prices plunged at the start ​of trading on Tuesday, following a volatile session for markets overnight after U.S. President Donald Trump declared the Middle East war ‌could be "over soon."】

item.title: 美元随油价回落，因市场期待伊朗战争迅速结束
item.description: 周二，市场猜测中东战争可能规模有限，美元避险吸引力有所减弱，这拉低了飙升的油价，并提振了风险资产。【原文：The dollar lost some of its safe-haven appeal on speculation that the war in the Middle East could prove limited on Tuesday, pulling down skyrocketing ​oil prices and boosting risk assets.】

item.title: 油价暴跌逾6%，特朗普预测中东局势将缓和
item.description: 油价周二下跌，此前一个交易日曾触及逾三年高位。美国总统特朗普预测中东战争可能很快结束，缓解了市场对全球石油供应长期中断的担忧。【原文：Oil ‌prices fell on Tuesday after hitting their highest level in more than three years in the prior session as U.S. President Donald Trump predicted the war in the Middle East could end soon, easing concerns about prolonged disruptions to global oil supplies.】

item.title: 澳大利亚2月商业环境保持稳定，信心指数下滑
item.description: 一项衡量澳大利亚商业状况的指标显示，2月份销售额略有改善，但由于借贷成本上升，商业信心指数在11个月来首次转为负值。【原文：A measure of Australian business conditions held steady in February with sales improving a little, a survey ​showed on Tuesday, though sentiment turned negative for ‌the first time in 11 months as borrowing costs rose.】

item.title: 布伦特原油期货下跌逾7%
item.description: 布伦特原油周二下跌逾7%，此前美国总统特朗普暗示中东战争可能即将结束，缓解了市场对全球石油供应长期中断的担忧。【原文：Brent crude fell more ​than 7% ‌on Tuesday after U.S. President ​Donald Trump ​hinted that the ⁠war in ​the Middle East could ​end soon, easing concerns about prolonged ​disruptions to ​global oil supplies.】

item.title: 德国出版商拒绝苹果修订后的应用追踪规则，呼吁对其处以反垄断罚款
item.description: 德国出版商和广告商协会周二表示，苹果公司拟议的追踪规则变更未能解决移动广告市场的反垄断问题，并敦促该国反垄断机构对这家美国科技巨头处以罚款。【原文：Apple's proposed changes to its app tracking rules do not resolve antitrust issues in the mobile advertising market, associations representing German publishers ​and advertisers said on Tuesday as they urged the country's antitrust ‌authority to slap a fine on the U.S. tech giant.】

item.title: 消息人士称高盛推出对冲基金产品押注企业贷款下跌
item.description: 据知情人士透露，华尔街投资银行巨头高盛正向对冲基金推介一款金融产品，该产品允许对冲基金对企业贷款进行做空或做多操作。【原文：Wall Street investment banking giant Goldman Sachs is pitching ‌hedge funds a financial product that allows them to take a short or long position on corporate loans, a source familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 加拿大表示将允许TikTok继续在该国运营
item.description: 加拿大政府周一表示，在完成国家安全审查后，将允许TikTok继续在加拿大运营，并批准该科技平台的投资计划。【原文：The Canadian government said on Monday that it will let TikTok continue to operate ​in Canada and allow an investment by the tech platform to ‌proceed after completing a national security review.】

item.title: 路透社/益普索民调显示，美国民众预期伊朗遭袭后汽油价格将持续上涨
item.description: 路透社/益普索民调显示，多数美国人认为在特朗普总统决定对伊朗发动军事打击后，未来数月汽油价格将上涨，且许多人预期冲突将长期持续。该民调于周一结束。【原文：Most Americans think gasoline prices are ​going to rise in coming months following President Donald Trump's decision to launch military strikes on Iran, and ‌many expect a protracted conflict, according to a Reuters/Ipsos poll that closed on Monday.】

item.title: 独家：消息人士称，私募股权公司EQT正考虑以60亿美元出售Linux先驱SUSE
item.description: 据两位知情人士透露，私募股权公司EQT AB正考虑出售开源软件公司SUSE，该交易估值可能高达60亿美元（51亿欧元）。【原文：Private equity firm EQT AB is exploring a sale of open-source software company SUSE in a deal that could value it up ​to $6 billion (5.1 billion euros), according to two people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 特朗普表示美国将豁免部分石油相关制裁以确保供应
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周一表示，美国将豁免某些石油相关制裁，以确保充足的石油供应并降低油价。【原文：President Donald Trump ​said on Monday that the ‌United States is waiving certain oil-related sanctions as a way to ensure ​adequate oil supply and lower ​prices.】

item.title: 麦迪逊空气解决方案公司披露美国IPO申报文件显示营收激增
item.description: 麦迪逊空气解决方案公司周一披露其2025年营收激增，这家暖通空调企业已公开其在美国首次公开募股的申请文件。【原文：Madison Air Solutions on Monday disclosed a surge in its 2025 revenue ​as the heating, ventilation and air conditioning company made public paperwork ‌for its U.S. initial public offering.】

item.title: 贝塔科技加速军用货运无人机研发进程，获美国联邦航空管理局拨款
item.description: 无人机初创企业Beta Technologies正将Alia MV250军用运输无人机的发展进程提前六个月，首飞预计将于今年实现。该公司首席执行官凯尔·克拉克在接受路透社采访时透露了这一消息。【原文：Drone startup Beta Technologies is speeding ‌up development of its Alia MV250 military cargo drone by six months, with the first flight now expected this year, Beta chief executive Kyle Clark told Reuters in an interview.】
